home.heroSubtitle: All operations run 100% locally in your browser. No databases, no telemetry, no tracking, no logins. Air-gapped secure by design.

local.title: 100% Browser Local
local.description: Your files and media never touch a server. Chunks are buffered directly in your browser's memory.

privacy.title: Zero Tracking
privacy.description: No cookies, no database logging, no telemetry. We don't even know you're here.

offline.title: Offline-First
offline.description: Once loaded, you can run these tools completely offline. Perfect for sensitive content.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully transparent codebase. Inspect the code, verify the local-only execution yourself.

recorder.title: Record Once
recorder.subtitle: Record your camera, screen, or microphone completely offline. Save directly to your local drive.
recorder.permissionGateDesc: To start recording, we need permission to access your media devices. All capturing and processing runs locally in your browser.
recorder.maxDurationWarning: Note: Recording is stored in your computer's RAM. We recommend keeping clips under 5 minutes to prevent out-of-memory errors.
recorder.downloadReady: Recording completed. Your file is ready to download.
recorder.errorDevices: Failed to access media devices. Please verify permissions in your browser bar.
